description: Repeated freezes and slowdowns on the Studio 1 on-air playout PC point to ageing hardware that can no longer keep up with the playout software. Opening a problem record to track the replacement and prevent further dead air.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring Studio 1 playout PC freezes

description: The Studio 1 air conditioning has failed repeatedly during the morning show. Refrigerant loss and an ageing compressor are the likely cause. Tracking a permanent fix rather than repeated recharges.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring Studio 1 aircon failures

description: Listeners regularly report buffering on the website live stream during the morning peak. The stream server appears under-provisioned for peak concurrent listeners. Tracking a capacity upgrade.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - live stream buffering at peak

description: Intermittent channel dropouts on the Studio 2 mixing desk recur during interviews. Suspected firmware bug on the desk. Tracking the firmware upgrade and monitoring after the change.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - Studio 2 mixing desk channel dropouts

description: Multiple account lockouts have followed the two-factor authentication rollout, mostly from staff who did not complete enrolment before enforcement. Tracking improved onboarding and self-service reset.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - lockouts after two-factor rollout

description: On-air studios briefly lose power during load-shedding before the generator engages. Lack of studio-level UPS protection is the underlying cause. Tracking the UPS installation project.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - studio power loss during load-shedding

description: The podcast publishing server has failed to export episodes on several nights, delaying uploads. An unpatched export module is the suspected cause. Tracking the patch and monitoring.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring podcast publishing failures

description: Office wifi repeatedly drops in the production area. Insufficient access point coverage near the studios is the likely root cause. Tracking the access point upgrade.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring production area wifi drops

description: The Listen Live player fails on mobile browsers after the recent website update. A front-end regression is the suspected cause. Tracking the fix and regression testing.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - Listen Live broken on mobile

description: Intermittent connectivity loss in the newsroom recurs during bulletin prep. A failing network switch is the likely cause. Tracking the switch replacement.
The reception door access reader has failed on more than one early shift. Worn reader hardware is the suspected cause. Tracking the replacement and re-enrolment of cards.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - reception door reader failures

description: An on-air hum recurs on Studio 1 microphone channels. Ageing cabling and mics are the suspected cause. Tracking the cable and microphone replacement.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring Studio 1 microphone hum

description: Staff intermittently lose access to shared show-prep folders after server maintenance. Permission propagation on the file share is the suspected cause. Tracking the SharePoint migration as the fix.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring show-prep folder access errors

description: Water ingress from ageing ceiling pipework has caused leaks near the studios more than once. Corroded pipework is the suspected cause. Tracking a plumbing inspection and repair.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - recurring ceiling pipe leaks

description: Listeners regularly complain that station jingles are louder than the music bed. Inconsistent loudness mastering on the jingle pack is the cause. Tracking re-mastering and loudness normalisation.
